options.content: Presentations and calculations

panels.description: Calculate Discovery counts as a percentage against an arbitrary value

params: search Host,NetworkDevice,StorageDevice,CloudProvider where (last_update_success and not (host_type has subword 'desktop' or host_type has subword 'client')  and (nodecount(traverse InferredElement:Inference::DiscoveryAccess) or (__resource_unit = 'host' or __resource_unit = 'network')) OR nodecount( traverse :::StorageSystem traverse :::StoragePool)>0 OR nodecount( traverse :::CloudRegion traverse :::CloudService)>0) show kind(#)  PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

panels.description: Calculate Discovery Host & NetworkDevice counts as a percentage against an arbitrary value

links.title: detail
links.url: /d/$dbd_url?$(__all_variables)&orgId=$__org&var-search=Host,NetworkDevice&var-where=last_update_success and not (host_type has subword 'desktop' or host_type has subword 'client')  and (nodecount(traverse InferredElement:Inference::DiscoveryAccess) or (__resource_unit = 'host' or __resource_unit = 'network'))&var-show=type PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

params: search Host,NetworkDevice where last_update_success and not (host_type has subword 'desktop' or host_type has subword 'client')  and (nodecount(traverse InferredElement:Inference::DiscoveryAccess) or (__resource_unit = 'host' or __resource_unit = 'network')) show kind(#)  PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

panels.description:
Import  data from another Panel and present as a percentage against a given count stored as a variable.
There are 8 components to this score each with a maximum of 3 so 24 is a perfect score

options.content: Data collection efficiency

panels.description:
Multiple queries to datasource within a single panel.
Repeated queries of similar data.
Check Query Inspector stats

value.title: detail
value.url: /d/$dbd_url?$(__all_variables)&orgId=$__org&var-search=ModelDefinition&var-where=state = 'published' AND NOT (type='sam' OR type='rules')&var-show=kind PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

value.title: detail
value.url: /d/$dbd_url?$(__all_variables)&orgId=$__org&var-search=ModelDefinition&var-where=type = 'rules_template' AND not (* has subword 'com.bmc' or * has subword 'com')&var-show=kind PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

params: SEARCH ModelDefinition WHERE state = 'published' SHOW name PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)
SEARCH ModelDefinition WHERE state = 'published' AND type='rules' SHOW name PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)
SEARCH ModelDefinition WHERE state = 'published' AND type='sam' SHOW name PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)
SEARCH ModelDefinition WHERE state = 'published' AND NOT (type='sam' OR type='rules') SHOW name PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)
search ModelDefinition where type = 'rules_template' AND not (* has subword 'com.bmc' or * has subword 'com') SHOW name PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

panels.description: Counts of devices with no Network Interface relationships can indicate data quality concerns and should be investigated

params: search Host,NetworkDevice,StorageDevice,Printer,SNMPManagedDevice show type, nodecount(traverse :::SoftwareInstance) as 'SI', nodecount(traverse :::NetworkInterface) as 'NIC', nodecount(traverse :::ModelDefinition where state = 'published') as 'SVC', nodecount(traverse :::SupportDetail) as 'EOL', #kind, model, os

options.content: Contextual data

panels.description:
Query various Discovery Node types for counts.
Selection updates Dashboard variables as feed to table panel

params: SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) Host,NetworkDevice,StorageDevice,Printer SHOW type PROCESSWITH countUnique(0)

SEARCH FLAGS(no_segment) $search WHERE $where and (model = '$chooser' OR type = '$chooser' or kind = '$chooser' or source = '$chooser' or name = '$chooser') SHOW (os_class OR kind OR model OR type OR short_name), name, (os OR version OR os_version OR friendlyTime(last_user_saved) OR nodecount(traverse :::CloudRegion))

options.content: Data merging

panels.description:
Pull data from Discovery & CMDB (BMC.ASSET)
Join on name

params: search Host,NetworkDevice  show  name as "HostName", health, os_class, os_type, os_version, model, vendor, virtual, cloud, #InferredElement:Inference:Associate:DiscoveryAccess.endpoint as 'Scanned via',  #ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:HardwareDetail:SupportDetail.end_ext_support_date as 'End of Extended Support (EOES) Date',  #ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:HardwareDetail:SupportDetail.end_support_date as 'End of Support (EOS) Date',  #ElementWithDetail:SupportDetail:HardwareDetail:SupportDetail.retirement_date as 'Retirement (EOL) Date'
